zh.lifeSummary: 當Parnell Barker於1530年出生在英國素福爾可易普斯維其時，她的父親William Barker60歲，母親Dame Elizabeth Hill30歲。她於1546年與Robert Cutler I在英國素福爾可易普斯維其結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1595年3月9日在她的家鄉享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Parnell Barker于1530年出生在英国素福爾可易普斯維其时，她的父亲William Barker60岁，母亲Dame Elizabeth Hill30岁。她于1546年与Robert Cutler I在英国素福爾可易普斯維其结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1595年3月9日在她的家乡享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Barker
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a tanner of leather, from Middle English barkere ‘tanner’, tree bark having been used as the tanning agent.

English: occupational name for a shepherd, from Middle English berker, bercher (Old French berchier, bercher, berkier, berker, Late Latin berbicarius, from berbex ‘ram’, genitive berbicis). With the change of -ar- to -er- in Middle English, this became indistinguishable from the preceding name (see 1 above).
Americanized form of German   Berger   or   Barger  .

variants.name: Berger
meanings: German, Dutch, Swedish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): topographic name for someone who lived in the mountains or hills (see   Berg  ). The surname of German origin is also found in many other European countries, e.g. in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Russia, Poland, Czechia, Hungary, and Croatia, and Slovenia, often as a translation into German of corresponding Slavic topographic names or surnames. As a Jewish name it is mainly artificial. Compare   Bargar  ,   Barger  ,   Barker  ,   Barrier  , and   Barriger  .
French: occupational name from Old French bergier ‘shepherd’ (from Late Latin berbicarius, from berbex ‘ram’). It is also found in England, as a surname of Huguenot origin. Compare Shepard .
Norwegian: habitational name from any of various farms so named with the plural of   Berg   ‘mountain’.

nameMeanings.name: Parnell
meanings: A female name corrupted from Petronilla.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Parnell Barker was born in 1530, in Ipswich, Suffolk, England, her father, William Barker, was 60 and her mother, Dame Elizabeth Hill, was 30. She married Robert Cutler I in 1546, in Ipswich, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 8 daughters. She died on 9 March 1595, in her hometown, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Parnell Barker est née en 1530, à Ipswich, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, William Barker, avait 60 ans et sa mère, Dame Elizabeth Hill, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Cutler I en 1546, à Ipswich, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée le 9 mars 1595, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 65 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Parnell Barkerが1530年にイギリススフォルクイプスウィチで生まれた時，父William Barkerは60歳，母Dame Elizabeth Hillは30歳であった。1546年にイギリススフォルクイプスウィチでRobert Cutler Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1595年3月9日に故郷で65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Parnell Barker(이)가 1530년 영국 수폴크 이프스위치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Barker(은)는 60세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Dame Elizabeth Hill(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1546년 영국 수폴크 이프스위치에서 Robert Cutler I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1595년 3월 9일 그녀의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Parnell Barker nasceu em 1530, em Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Barker, tinha 60 anos e sua mãe, Dame Elizabeth Hill, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Cutler I em 1546, em Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em 9 de março de 1595, em sua cidade natal, com 65 anos.

ru.Saint Nicholas Church, Ipswich, Suffolk,: ст ничолас' чурч, ипсвич, суффолк, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Parnell Barker родилась в 1530 г. в местности ипсвич, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени William Barker было 60 лет, а матери, которую звали Dame Elizabeth Hill, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Cutler I в 1546 г. в местности ипсвич, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Она умерла 9 марта 1595 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 65 лет.
